text.title: go-concurrency Output Contract
text.summary: Required code-shape and CI invariants for concurrency-heavy Go packages.

section.title: JSON Schema (package invariants)

example.note: Add-before-launch, ctx.Done in every select, writer closes, defer wg.Done.
Two violations: r2 (no exit), r6 (Add inside body).

list.item: Every `go ` spawn has either ctx.Done(), channel-range, or WaitGroup.Done path documented in a comment.
Channels are closed only by the goroutine that writes to them.
Semaphores sized to downstream capacity (DB pool, rate limit) with a comment explaining the derivation.
